explanation: The user wants all potatoes to be placed in the cabinet. Since the cabinet needs to be opened to place objects inside, I first pick up each potato, open the cabinet, place the potato inside, and then close the cabinet after all potatoes are stored. The plan ensures that the cabinet is properly opened and closed, and each potato is handled sequentially. As no specific potato IDs are given, I assume the first two potatoes (potato_0 and potato_1) are available based on standard naming convention. The plan follows proper robot behavior: only one object is held at a time, and placement occurs only after picking up and opening the cabinet.
